quotes: never two of the same style competing on one screen/section
three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section

rules.intent: Prevent visual competition and clutter from duplicate callout treatments in the same viewport.
rules.rule_text: Callout boxes are limited to three approved styles and should be used judiciously; never place two callouts of the same style competing on one screen or section.

quotes: Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text with Gold (#ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below. Centered text.
rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.

1. **Main callout (key point):** Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text. [GENERAL: rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.]

rules.intent: Maintain the distinct visual treatment of primary key-point callouts.
rules.rule_text: The main key-point callout style must use bold Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) centered text with Gold (color.primary.gold = #ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below (rule weight = 2px, rule width ≈ 60-100% of text block), separated from the text block by 16px vertical padding (padding.callout.main_rule_text = 16px).

quotes: Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint with Bold Brand Blue text
20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.

2. **Secondary/data callout:** **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). [GENERAL: 20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.]

rules.intent: Standardize the background tint and typography for data-focused callout containers.
rules.rule_text: The secondary or data callout style uses a Light Blue (color.tertiary.light_blue = #E6F0F9) background box at a 70% tint (opacity.logo.gold = 0.7) paired with bold Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) text. It includes 20px of internal padding and an accent corner radius. It may also include a single line icon.

quotes: Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint, Bold Brand Blue headline, line icons, Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads, Regular Graphite (#212121) body text
24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.

3. **Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions):** **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**. [GENERAL: 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.]

rules.intent: Maintain rigorous visual hierarchy, readability, and mobile responsiveness in text-dense callout containers.
rules.rule_text: Text-heavy callouts must use a Golden Sand (color.tertiary.golden_sand = #FEF1C8) box at a 30% tint (opacity.callout.golden_sand_box = 0.3) containing a bold Brand Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529b) headline, bold Sky Blue (color.secondary.sky_blue = #358CCB) subheads, and regular Graphite (color.tertiary.graphite = #212121) body text. Layout requires 24px internal padding, and its two-column icon+text pattern must collapse to a single column on mobile breakpoints.
